summary: 9 countries · Iran strikes & Hormuz blockade dominate world coverage · US 250th anniversary

items.title: US strikes Iran for a third night as Trump says a deal is still "possible"
items.note: Live coverage frames Washington as escalating militarily even while claiming to keep diplomacy open.

items.title: Trump to deliver national address reopening 2020 election-fraud claims
items.note: French coverage foregrounds that the fraud claim is "false", a framing US partisan outlets often soften.

items.title: Trump reinstates US blockade of Iranian shipping in Strait of Hormuz, orders new strikes
items.note: Asia-Pacific outlets watch the Hormuz chokepoint closely for its impact on regional oil supply.

items.title: US turns 250 with Trump center stage
US–Iran conflict widens after deadly tanker attack in Strait of Hormuz
"Ratify Mercosur or risk losing South America to China," Uruguay warns EU
items.note: Seen from Europe, US retreat from Latin America reads as an opening for Chinese influence.

items.title: US conducts new wave of strikes on Iran as ceasefire falters
United States at 250: Seven tests of the American experiment
With the Iran war, more Americans ask if the "Israeli tail is wagging the US dog"
items.note: A framing common in Turkish pro-government media: US foreign policy as captive to Israeli interests.

items.title: Venezuela to buy only US-made products with oil-deal revenue, Trump says
CENTCOM announces a third straight night of US strikes on Iranian targets
items.orig: Original (ru): «В СЕНТКОМ объявили о третьей подряд ночи ударов по объектам Ирана»

items.title: Analyst: the US "won't be able to fight Iran for long"
items.orig: Original (ru): «Политолог Шаповалов: США не смогут долго воевать с Ираном»
items.note: State media pairs war reporting with commentary predicting American overreach and decline.

items.title: Trump says he won't sign bipartisan housing bill — "a big yawn"
How the US "backstabs" its allies under "America First" logic
items.note: Beijing's state tabloid consistently frames US alliances as unreliable and self-serving.

items.title: Trump investigates alleged Iranian-drone storage in Cuba, warns the US will act if confirmed
items.orig: Original (es): «Trump investiga presunto almacenamiento de drones iraníes en Cuba…»

items.title: US declassifies 40 new UFO files, releasing 19 sighting recordings
items.orig: Original (es): «EU desclasifica 40 nuevos archivos sobre OVNIS…»

items.title: US to slash visa-processing embassies in Africa, retaining just 20 hubs
items.note: African papers track the practical fallout of US policy. Here, that means sharply reduced visa access.

items.title: US seeks deeper AGOA trade penetration in Africa
